TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Palinkaan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Palinkaan. 543 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,537 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 31% niqan 480 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 69% niqan 1,057 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 1%, Sakizaya 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = palinkaan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ palinkaan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%, tajal *%, saki*aja *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Palinkaan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Palinkaan. 543 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,537 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 31% niqan 480 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 69% niqan 1,057 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 1%, Sakizaya 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = palinkaan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ palinkaan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%, tajal *%, saki*aja *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
